zh.lifeSummary: 當Nadale de Maulmont於1245年1月8日出生在法國利姆辛可雷莫蒙特時，她的父親Pierre Ier de Maulmont21歲，母親Denise de Lomagne11242歲。她於1263年與Pierre Rogier de Beaufort在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1301年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nadale de Maulmont于1245年1月8日出生在法国利姆辛可雷莫蒙特时，她的父亲Pierre Ier de Maulmont21岁，母亲Denise de Lomagne11242岁。她于1263年与Pierre Rogier de Beaufort在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1301年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nadale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Salvatore, Dante, Domenic, Gennaro, Sal, Carmine, Ciro, Domenico.

Italian: from the personal name Natale, from Latin Natalis, itself from dies natalis ‘day of birth’, among early Christians referring to the day of a martyr's or saint's death, i.e. birth to eternal life; later it was given in honor of the Christmas festival.

variants.name: Yalda
meanings: 20th-century coinage, an elaboration of the girl's name Val with the suffix -da, extracted from names such as Glenda and Linda .

variants.name: Natalie
meanings: form of   Natalia  , adopted from Russian in the early 20th century, probably, like   Nadine  , under the influence of  Diaghilev's  Ballet Russe, which was established in Paris in  1909 . The name is now very common in France and in the English-speaking world, where it was borne by the actress  Natalie Wood  (  1938–81 ). She was born  Natasha Gurdin , in San Francisco. Her father was of Russian descent, her mother of French extraction.

variants.name: Natali
meanings: name, now also used in the English-speaking world. It is from the Late Latin name Natalia, a derivative of Latin natalis (dies) ‘birthday’, especially Christ's birthday, i.e. Christmas ( compare Noël ). St Natalia was a Christian inhabitant of Nicomedia who is said to have given succour to the martyrs, including her husband Adrian, who suffered there in persecutions under Diocletian in 303 . She is regarded as a Christian saint, although she was not herself martyred.

en.lifeSummary: When Nadale de Maulmont was born on 8 January 1245, in Maumont, Corrèze, Limousin, France, her father, Pierre Ier de Maulmont, was 21 and her mother, Denise de Lomagne, was 11242. She married Pierre Rogier de Beaufort in 1263, in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1301, in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nadale de Maulmont est née le 8 janvier 1245, à Maumont, Corrèze, Limousin, France, son père, Pierre Ier de Maulmont, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Denise de Lomagne, avait 11242 ans. Elle a épousé Pierre Rogier de Beaufort en 1263, à Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1301, à Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nadale de Maulmont am 8. Januar 1245 in Maumont, Corrèze, Limousin, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre Ier de Maulmont 21 und ihre Mutter Denise de Lomagne 11242. Sie hat 1263 in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Pierre Rogier de Beaufort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1301 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nadale de Maulmont è nata il il 8 gennaio 1245 nel Maumont, Corrèze, Limousin, Francia, sua padre, Pierre Ier de Maulmont, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Denise de Lomagne, aveva 11242 anni. Lei sposato Pierre Rogier de Beaufort nel 1263, nel Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1301, nel Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nadale de Maulmontが1245年1月8日にフランスリモウシンコルeズマウモントで生まれた時，父Pierre Ier de Maulmontは21歳，母Denise de Lomagneは11242歳であった。1263年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズロシエルス-ド'eグレトンスでPierre Rogier de Beaufortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1301年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズロシエルス-ド'eグレトンスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nadale de Maulmont(이)가 1245년 1월 8일 프랑스 리모우신 코e즈 모몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre Ier de Maulmont(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Denise de Lomagne(은)는 11242세였다. 그녀는 1263년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 로시어스-드'e글레토스에서 Pierre Rogier de Beaufort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1301년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 로시어스-드'e글레토스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nadale de Maulmont nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1245, em Maumont, Corrèze, Limousin, França, seu pai, Pierre Ier de Maulmont, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Denise de Lomagne, tinha 11242 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierre Rogier de Beaufort em 1263, em Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1301, em Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nadale de Maulmont родилась 8 января 1245 г. в местности маумонт, коррeз, лимусин, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre Ier de Maulmont было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Denise de Lomagne, 11242. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierre Rogier de Beaufort в 1263 г. в местности росиирс-д'eглетонс, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1301 г. в местности росиирс-д'eглетонс, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nadale de Maulmont nació el 8 de enero de 1245, en Maumont, Corrèze, Limousin, Francia, su papá, Pierre Ier de Maulmont, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Denise de Lomagne, tenía 11242 años. Se casó con Pierre Rogier de Beaufort en 1263, en Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1301, en Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
